_comment: TEMPLATE / schema reference. The real jira-projects.json is TEAM-LOCAL: `/author-ticket` first-run setup (or --reconfigure) creates it at the WORKSPACE ROOT by fetching THAT team's product's JIRA projects + components and filling this shape. The plugin ships only this template — it never bundles any product's real config, so a team's plugin doesn't expose other products' projects. (The admin's full filled copy lives in the engine at jira-integration/jira-projects.json.)
site: TBD — your Atlassian site, e.g. fb-tech.atlassian.net

projects.name: TBD
building_blocks: <filled from the project's live JIRA components>
